Global (All).title: Taiwan Says Chinese Military Drills an  'Act of Aggression'
Global (All).summary: China's military drills near Taiwan after a phone call between U.S. House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the island's president has been described by Taipei as an 'act of aggression'.

Global (All).title: Ukraine reports over 1,000 Russian strikes in 24 hours as battle for Bakhmut continues
Global (All).summary: Russia's military has launched over 1,000 strikes on Ukraine in 24 hours, Ukraine's military reported on Twitter. The strikes targeted Ukrainian forces and infrastructure, according to the military.

Global (All).title: U.S. House Speaker Nancy Pelosi arrives in Taiwan as tension with China rises
Global (All).summary: U.S. House Speaker Nancy Pelosi visited Taiwan on Tuesday, a move that has heightened tensions with China, which has threatened to take 'all necessary measures' to protect itself.

United States.title: Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell testifies before Congress amidst market volatility concerns.
United States.summary: Powell's testimony could impact market expectations and influence the Federal Reserve's interest rate decisions, impacting the US economy.

United States.title: Gun control activists hold rallies in several US cities.
United States.summary: Activists demand stricter gun control laws following recent mass shootings, with some cities planning sit-ins and demonstrations.

United States.title: US-China relations deteriorate as the US Senate votes to pass the Taiwan Relations Act.
United States.summary: The Taiwan Relations Act strengthens the United States' commitment to Taiwan, potentially exacerbating tensions with China and increasing the risk of military conflict in the region.

South Korea.title: North Korea launches ballistic missile over Japan, sparking global concern
South Korea.summary: North Korea launched a ballistic missile that crossed over Japan and landed in the Pacific Ocean, prompting a strong rebuke from the international community.

South Korea.title: Protests erupt in South Korea over plans to develop a new naval base
South Korea.summary: Demonstrators took to the streets in South Korea to protest government plans to develop a new naval base in the country's west coast, citing concerns over the potential impact on the local environment.

South Korea.title: South Korea's COVID-19 cases surge, raising concern about potential lockdown
South Korea.summary: South Korea reported a surge in COVID-19 cases, prompting concerns about a potential lockdown in the country and the impact it could have on the economy.

Japan.title: North Korea fires ballistic missile over Japan, prompting evacuation warnings
Japan.summary: South Korea's military says the missile was fired from the Sunan area of Pyongyang and flew 1,000 km (620 miles) into the Sea of Japan. Japan's defense minister says it posed no immediate threat to the country but warned of possible further launches.

Japan.title: Japan's new defense strategy emphasizes China's growing military power
Japan.summary: Japan's new defense strategy, unveiled by the government, highlights the growing military power of China and the need for cooperation with other nations to counter its ambitions.

Japan.title: Japan's justice minister resigns over corruption scandal
Japan.summary: Japan's justice minister, Yasuhiro Hanashi, has resigned over a corruption scandal involving a businessman accused of embezzlement. The scandal has tarnished the government's image and sparked calls for greater transparency.
